◎简　　介  

　　Rachel Taylor has been called to serve in the Austria Vienna mission. She begins her journey of salvation with high ideals, low language skills and a determination to change the world. Through her challenges with the culture, cuisine, and a cantankerous companion, she struggles to find meaning behind the very beliefs she has set forth to share. /The Errand of Angels is a moving...
